race.comment: NUMBERSNEVERSEEN (8) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race, 2.25 lengths away fourth over 1600m at Pakenham Synthetic. Tricky draw, but this much more suitable and the extra trip suits. JANEY BOPPER (9) hit the frame two starts ago at Werribee but ran below par last time when sixth and beaten 2.5 lengths over 1800m at this track. Has her share of talent. Hard to beat in this suitable race. NEWCOMBE (7) has registered two minor placings from three runs this preparation, the latest a 1-3/4-length second over 1620m at Donald. Has his share of ability. Hard to beat in this suitable race. DARWINIAN (3) is much better suited here than first-up and Yendall sticks.
